purpose: Deterministic deliverable-type to topic mapping used by the router to avoid channel-confusion and double-loading.

rules.signal: user wants a list of accounts to target
user wants inbound signups scored / a capture funnel built
user wants a deep brief on one named company before a meeting
user wants the messages / sequence to reach contacts
user wants a C-level decision narrative + business case
user wants an RFP/discovery turned into a win-shaped document
user wants a one-pager / battle card / ROI calc / positioning

channel_strip_rule: If the request names a channel (LinkedIn, email, deck, call), ignore the channel and classify by the artifact the user is asking to produce.
fallback: On a genuine tie or no fit, ask exactly one disambiguating question; never load two playbooks.
